    local pivot = t[hi]
    local i = lo - 1
    for j = lo, hi - 1 do
        if t[j] <= pivot then

        end
    end
    local tmp = t[i+1]; t[i+1] = t[hi]; t[hi] = tmp
    return i + 1
end

    if lo < hi then

        quicksort(t, lo, p - 1)
        quicksort(t, p + 1, hi)
    end
end

    local i = lo - 1
    for j = lo, hi - 1 do
        if t[j] <= pivot then
            i = i + 1
            local tmp = t[i]; t[i] = t[j]; t[j] = tmp
        end
    end
    local tmp = t[i+1]; t[i+1] = t[hi]; t[hi] = tmp
    return i + 1
end

local function quicksort(t, lo, hi)
    if lo < hi then
        local p = partition(t, lo, hi)
        quicksort(t, lo, p - 1)
        quicksort(t, p + 1, hi)
    end
end
